ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset. */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset. */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample. */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample. */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Description of the sample. */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the sample is from. */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the sample is from. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study. */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study. */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study. */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator. */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study. */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user. */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator). */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role. */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role. */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing permissions for the role. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID. */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp when the dataset was created.
